zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory於1531年2月出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼沙吉爾 卡素時，他的父親James Butler35歲，母親Lady Joan Fitzgerald21歲。他於1582年11月9日與Elizabeth Sheffield在英國英格蘭倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1594年登記服兵役。他於1559年被列為he held the office of treasurer of ireland。他去世於1614年11月22日在愛爾蘭庫迪 迪拉利卡利可--素爾享年83歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory于1531年2月出生在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼沙吉爾 卡素时，他的父亲James Butler35岁，母亲Lady Joan Fitzgerald21岁。他于1582年11月9日与Elizabeth Sheffield在英国英格兰倫敦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1594年登记服兵役。他于1559年被列为he held the office of treasurer of ireland。他去世于1614年11月22日在爱尔兰庫迪 迪拉利卡利可--素爾享年83岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.
Accession of James I. Surrender of Hugh O'Neill. Enforcement of English Law in Ireland.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory was born in February 1531, in Shankill Castle, County Kilkenny, Ireland, his father, James Butler, was 35 and his mother, Lady Joan Fitzgerald, was 21. He married Elizabeth Sheffield on 9 November 1582, in London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1594. In 1559, his occupation is listed as he held the office of treasurer of ireland. He died on 22 November 1614, in Carrick-on-Suir, County Tipperary, Ireland, at the age of 83, and was buried in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory est né en février 1531, à Shankill Castle, County Kilkenny, Irlande, son père, James Butler, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Fitzgerald, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Sheffield le 9 novembre 1582, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1594. En 1559, sa profession de son indiquée est he held the office of treasurer of ireland. Il est décédé le 22 novembre 1614, à Carrick-on-Suir, County Tipperary, Irlande, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory im Februar 1531 in Shankill Castle, County Kilkenny, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Butler 35 und seine Mutter Lady Joan Fitzgerald 21. Er hat am 9. November 1582 in London, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Sheffield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1594 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1559 ist sein Beruf als he held the office of treasurer of ireland aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. November 1614 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Carrick-on-Suir, County Tipperary, Irland und wurde in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory è nato il nel febbraio 1531 nel Shankill Castle, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, il suo padre, James Butler, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan Fitzgerald, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Sheffield il 9 novembre 1582, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1594. Nel 1559, la sua occupazione è indicata come he held the office of treasurer of ireland. Morì il 22 novembre 1614, nel Carrick-on-Suir, County Tipperary, Irlanda, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossoryが1531年2月にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーシャンキル カストルで生まれた時，父James Butlerは35歳，母Lady Joan Fitzgeraldは21歳であった。1582年11月9日にイギリスイギリスロンドンでElizabeth Sheffieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1594年に兵役登録をした。1559年，職業はhe held the office of treasurer of irelandと記録されている。彼は1614年11月22日にアイルランドコウントイ ティップエラリーカーリク-オン-スイルで83歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory(이)가 1531년 2월 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 섀킬 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Butler(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Fitzgerald(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1582년 11월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 Elizabeth Sheffield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1594년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1559년, 그의 직업은 he held the office of treasurer of ireland이었다. 그는 1614년 11월 22일 아일랜드 카운티 티페라리 카릭--수이르에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에 묻혔다.

mn.February 1531–22 November 1614: 1531 оны Хоёрдугаар сар–1614 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 22

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory nasceu em fevereiro de 1531, em Shankill Castle, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, seu pai, James Butler, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Fitzgerald, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Sheffield em 9 de novembro de 1582, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1594. Em 1559, sua profissão aparece como he held the office of treasurer of ireland. Ele faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1614, em Carrick-on-Suir, County Tipperary, Irlanda, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory родился февраль 1531 г. в местности шанкилл кастл, коунти килкенни, Ирландия, его отцу по имени James Butler было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Fitzgerald, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Sheffield 9 ноября 1582 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1594 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1559 годуработал по профессии he held the office of treasurer of ireland. Он умер 22 ноября 1614 г. в местности каррикк-он-суир, коунти типпирэри, Ирландия в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Butler 3rd Earl of Ossory nació en febrero de 1531, en Shankill Castle, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, su papá, James Butler, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Fitzgerald, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Sheffield el 9 de noviembre de 1582, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1594. En 1559, su ocupación registrada era he held the office of treasurer of ireland. Murió el 22 de noviembre de 1614, en Carrick-on-Suir, County Tipperary, Irlanda, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.
